description: Breaking Change Risk: Detect caller-facing contract breaks and integration risk.

fixtures.notes: Removes the 'timeout int' parameter from the exported function GetUser, breaking all existing callers.
Exported function return type changes from (User, error) to (UserResponse, error), breaking callers that reference User fields.
Adds a new optional parameter via the variadic options pattern — all existing call sites remain valid.
Adds a brand-new exported function without modifying any existing function signatures or types.
Renames exported struct field 'ID' to 'UserId', silently breaking JSON marshaling contracts for all API consumers.
